text: Scene transitions make your demos feel polished. One line of config adds smooth fades between every scene.
Watch the transition between slides. The brightness dips to black and smoothly recovers. No hard cuts.
Add gif to your formats array and the pipeline exports a palette-optimized animated GIF alongside the MP4. Perfect for documentation and pull request previews.
Everything is config-driven. Set the transition type, duration, and export formats. No code changes needed in your demo script.
Install Argo and try it yourself.
